Brief description of changes.

## Why
Motivation and context.

## Type
- [ ] New skill protocol
- [ ] Skill improvement

## Checklist
- [ ] Skill follows the standard structure (Anti-Rationalization, Evidence, Failure Modes, Integration Points)
- [ ] Tested with a real AI agent
- [ ] No broken cross-references
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if applicable)
